note: V13 Beacon Phase III P2P gossip — Commit A (dormant). Full 7-check pipeline (size cap 4 KB, parse, sig verify with threshold-aware branch, network match, expiry, dedup LRU 32, per-peer rate-limit 8/min) wired into existing P2P dispatcher behind BEACON_P2P_ACTIVATION_HEIGHT = INT64_MAX sentinel. V13 nodes consume ZERO CPU on BCNN traffic until a future Commit B lowers the gate. (A) include/sost/beacon_p2p.h: BeaconP2PState class (LRU dedup + per-peer rate map + mutex); process_incoming() API with optional gate_height_override for testing. (B) src/beacon_p2p.cpp: full pipeline implementation; legacy handle_incoming_notice_message kept for backwards-compat. (C) src/sost-node.cpp: global g_beacon_p2p_state instance; new BCNN dispatcher arm in process_message(); p2p_broadcast_beacon_notice helper next to p2p_broadcast_tx. Misbehavior scoring matches audit recommendation: oversized=10, malformed=10, rate-limit=5, bad-sig=silent. (D) tests/test_v13_beacon_phase3_p2p.cpp NEW: 15 functions / 42 asserts / 42 PASS covering dormancy, oversized, malformed, empty array, multi-notice, bad sig, wrong network, expired, cache memory cap, rate map bookkeeping, decision_name coverage, link-time no-consensus invariant. (E) docs/V13_BEACON_PHASE_III.md NEW (200 lines): full pipeline, code map, activation switch (single-line change for Commit B), limits + rationale, relay rules, risk register. ZERO consensus / block-validation / mining impact. Activation gate unchanged at INT64_MAX. BLOCKER for Commit B authorization: operator confirmation after dispatcher review.
